agent_summary: Customer reports: "I deposited 3000 taka via an agent but my balance did not increase" Classified as agent_cash_in_issue. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-8001.
recommended_next_action: Reconcile the matched cash-in against the agent ledger and escalate to agent operations.
customer_reply: Thank you for reporting the cash-in issue (reference TXN-8001). Our agent operations team will reconcile the deposit against the ledger and follow up through our official in-app support channel or hotline.
